R Notebook

library(lme4)
library(data.table)
library(R.utils)
library(stringr)
library(ggcorrplot)

Check the DE resutls from MAST analysis

Histogram of p-values

Histogram of p-values for each comparison

mast_pval_df = read.csv("./output/MastGenePvals_by_CellType.csv", 
                        header = TRUE, row.names = 1, as.is=TRUE)
head(mast_pval_df)
par(mgp=c(2,0.5,0), mar=c(3.5,3.5,1.5,1), cex.main=0.8)
layout(matrix(1:12,nrow=6,ncol = 2,byrow = TRUE))
for (i in 2:ncol(mast_pval_df)) {
  cti = names(mast_pval_df)[i]
  hist(mast_pval_df[,i], xlab = "p-values", breaks = 100, 
       main = paste("DE pvals of", cti, "vs. all other cells"))
}

par(mgp=c(2,0.5,0), mar=c(3.5,3.5,1.5,1), cex.main=0.8)
layout(matrix(1:12,nrow=6,ncol = 2,byrow = TRUE))

for (i in 2:ncol(mast_pval_df)) {
  cti = names(mast_pval_df)[i]
  pvi = mast_pval_df[,i]
  pvi[which(pvi < 1e-50)] = 1e-50
  hist(-log10(pvi), xlab = "p-values", breaks = 100, 
       main = paste("DE pvals of", cti, "vs. all other cells"))
}

Volcano plot of p-values for each comparison

Read in dataframe of fold changes.

fc_df = read.table("./output/Average_GeneExpression_by_CellType.txt", 
                   header = TRUE, sep = "\t", as.is=TRUE)
head(fc_df)
types = names(mast_pval_df)[-1]
types
##  [1] "B_cells"               "CD4T_memory"           "CD8T_B"               
##  [4] "CD8T_G"                "Dendritic_cells"       "Monocytes_Macrophages"
##  [7] "NK1"                   "NK2"                   "NK3"                  
## [10] "Plasma_cells"          "Tregs"
table(fc_df$gene == mast_pval_df$gene)
## 
##  TRUE 
## 10641
fc_df = merge(fc_df, mast_pval_df, by="gene")
par(mgp=c(2,0.5,0), mar=c(3.5,3.5,1.5,1))
layout(matrix(1:12,nrow=6,ncol = 2,byrow = TRUE))

for (i in 1:length(types)) {
  cti = types[i]
  pval = fc_df[[cti]]
  pval[which(pval < 1e-100)] = 1e-100
  log2_fc = log2(fc_df[[paste0("fc_",cti)]])
  log2_fc[which(log2_fc > 6)] = 6
  log2_fc[which(log2_fc < -6)] = -6
  
  plot(log2_fc, -log10(pval), 
       main = paste0("Volcano plot, ", types[i]), 
       xlab = "log2(fold change)", ylab = "-log10(p-value)", 
       xlim = c(-6,6), ylim = c(0, 100), cex=0.4, pch=20)
  abline(h=-log10(0.05/nrow(mast_pval_df)),col="red")
  abline(v=log2(1),col="red")
}

Select differentially expressed genes for each cell type

Select around 60 genes per cell type. Select those genes with smallest p-value and fold change, by scanning a series of percentiles. We selected those with smallest fold changes because we define fold changes as the average expression from other cell types versus the average expression of the cell type of interest. For example, for 1 percentile, we select the intersection of the genes with p-value < 1 percentile and fold change smaller than 1 percentile. Choose the percentile that gives use between 55 and 65 genes. In addition, also require the fold change to be smaller than 0.75

fc_cols = grep("^fc_", names(fc_df), value=TRUE)
u_cols  = grep("^u_", names(fc_df), value=TRUE)

apply(fc_df[,fc_cols], 2, function(v){table(v < 0.5)})
##       fc_B_cells fc_CD4T_memory fc_CD8T_B fc_CD8T_G fc_Dendritic_cells
## FALSE      10313          10586     10279     10628               9263
## TRUE         328             55       362        13               1378
##       fc_Monocytes_Macrophages fc_NK1 fc_NK2 fc_NK3 fc_Plasma_cells fc_Tregs
## FALSE                     7952   7267  10624  10585           10301    10436
## TRUE                      2689   3374     17     56             340      205
apply(fc_df[,fc_cols], 2, function(v){table(v < 0.7)})
##       fc_B_cells fc_CD4T_memory fc_CD8T_B fc_CD8T_G fc_Dendritic_cells
## FALSE       9876          10335      8377     10529               7174
## TRUE         765            306      2264       112               3467
##       fc_Monocytes_Macrophages fc_NK1 fc_NK2 fc_NK3 fc_Plasma_cells fc_Tregs
## FALSE                     5434   3757  10540  10053            9873     9767
## TRUE                      5207   6884    101    588             768      874
u_mtrx = fc_df[,u_cols]
u_mtrx[u_mtrx < 1e-3] = 1e-3
u_mtrx = log10(u_mtrx)
cr_mtrx = cor(u_mtrx, use="pair", method = "spearman")
summary(c(cr_mtrx))
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##  0.6029  0.6847  0.7575  0.7940  0.9141  1.0000
ggcorrplot(cr_mtrx) + 
  scale_fill_gradient2(limit = c(0.6,1), low = "blue", high =  "red", mid = "white", midpoint = 0.8)
## Scale for 'fill' is already present. Adding another scale for 'fill', which
## will replace the existing scale.

qs = seq(0.001, 0.05, by=0.001)

q2use = n2choose = rep(NA, 11)

for (i in 1:11) {
  fc_i = fc_df[,paste0("fc_",types[i])]
  pv_i = fc_df[[types[i]]]
  
  ni = rep(NA, length(qs))
  
  for(j in 1:length(qs)){
    qj = qs[j]
    ni[j] = sum(fc_i <= quantile(fc_i, probs=qj) & 
                  pv_i <=  quantile(pv_i, probs=2*qj))
  }
  q2use[i]    = qs[which.min(abs(ni- 60))]
  n2choose[i] = ni[which.min(abs(ni- 60))]
}
data.frame(types, q2use, n2choose)
genes.selected.perCellType = list()

for (i in 1:11) {
  type_i = types[i]
  fc_i = fc_df[,paste0("fc_",types[i])]
  fc_q = quantile(fc_i ,probs=q2use[i])
  pv_i = fc_df[[type_i]]
  pv_q = quantile(pv_i, probs=q2use[i])
  
  w2use = fc_i <= fc_q & pv_i <= pv_q
  genes.selected.perCellType[[type_i]] = fc_df$gene[w2use]
  marker = rep(0, nrow(fc_df))
  marker[w2use] = 1
  fc_df[[paste0("marker_",types[i])]] = marker
}

genes.selected.perCellType

Check how many genes are selected by more than one cell type

selected.genes = unlist(genes.selected.perCellType, use.names = FALSE) 
length(selected.genes)
## [1] 465
t1 = table(selected.genes)
table(t1)
## t1
##   1   2   3 
## 314  68   5
t1[t1 >= 3]
## selected.genes
## AC096579.7      CRTAM       GZMA       IL7R       NKG7 
##          3          3          3          3          3

Save the output

sig.genes = sort(unique(selected.genes))
signature_gene_df = fc_df[match(sig.genes, fc_df$gene), 
                          c("gene", paste0("u_",types))]
colnames(signature_gene_df) = c("geneSymbol", types)
write.table(signature_gene_df, file = "./output/SF2018_sig_gene_matrix.txt", 
            quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE)

dim(fc_df)
## [1] 10641    56
fc_df[1:2,]
write.table(fc_df, file = "./output/SF2018_sig_gene_details.txt", 
            quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE)
gc()
